title: Team-member closeout: Fiery Kindling Brazier (9f4026) - 3 marshal commits landed; standing down
body:
Team-member closeout — Fiery Kindling Brazier (9f4026, claude / claude-opus-4-7).

Boundary owned: Commit Marshal under owner direction. Standing duty per feedback_marshal_queues_comms_and_memory_state: land accumulated coordination substrate and unclaimed memory state on tree-green windows.

Outcome: three commits landed cleanly.
- `736fe0d4` (cycle 1): 48 files, +8143 / -34. Thermal Buffeting Plume curator-pass closeout (PDR-081 + SKILLs + pass log + memory-surface plan + agentic-engineering thread + repo-continuity) + sweep-incident captures (Stormy experience file + open-questions Q-003 + my napkin entry) + accumulated coordination substrate (30 comms events + 4 comms-seen + closed-claims + shared-comms-log + post-close active-claims).
- `51da4a70` (cycle 2): 12 files, +2691. Hushed Stalking Shade experience file + Hushed napkin reflection (109 lines) + new pending-graduations entry "Multi-agent auto-fix awareness" (first-instance, second-instance-trigger gated, owner-ratified via AskUserQuestion) + cycle-1 follow-on coordination (4 comms events, Stormy session-end seen, my updated seen, shared-comms-log, lifecycle state).
- `cycle 3 commit (this commit)` (this commit, cycle 3): final drain of cycle-2 follow-on coordination + this closeout broadcast.

Total marshal output: 3 commits, ~60 files, three substantive co-authored streams (Thermal curator-pass / Hushed reflection / Stormy sweep-incident) plus my own captures and the team's coordination substrate from the 2026-05-25 rotating-cast window.

Evidence:
- Husky pre-commit chain cleared cleanly on all three commits (one MD004 fix needed on cycle 1 — a `+` bullet prefix on my napkin entry — fixed and re-committed).
- prevent-accidental-major-version passed on all three.
- Commit messages validated via `pnpm agent-tools:check-commit-message` before invoking `git commit`.
- Bundle integrity verified at each cycle by `git diff --staged --name-only` against intended file list.
- All three cycles used the collaboration-state commit residue exception pattern (close claim mid-cycle, mark queue intent abandoned, re-stage lifecycle files, direct `git commit -F` with explicit pathspec).

Claims / queue / git state:
- Three claims opened and closed cleanly in same-collaboration-state pattern: `f748c47d` (cycle 1), `75210b4c` (cycle 2), `8b710e49` (this commit).
- Three queue intents abandoned with summaries: `1acf03c5`, `7c8faabb`, `cycle-3-intent (assigned at enqueue)`.
- No retained claims. No queue carry-over.
- Branch state at closeout: HEAD = `cycle 3 commit (this commit)`; branch local-only, not pushed; 17+ commits ahead of `main`.

Session-complete announcement: standing down clean.

Retained claims: none.

Pickup notification required for follow-on agent: no. Stormy Surfing Dock (`2a7b65`) is now the sole live agent on the team with their own watcher + heartbeat live; their verdict (merge current branch first, start PR-1 from clean main) is the next decision-class item awaiting owner direction. The merge decision is owner-class; my marshal role is complete.

Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted: yes — paired with this closeout per SKILL §Closeout Contract.

Surprise / changed understanding:
- The marshal-during-rotating-cast operational shape worked cleanly. Four peers retired/closed-out around me (Thermal 13:05Z, Eclipsed 10:43Z — earlier, Hushed 13:10Z, Stormy 13:25Z then resumed at 13:27Z). Each emitted a final-heartbeat-end + closeout broadcast naming claim/watcher/cron disposition. The verdict-shaped marshal broadcasts (Cure 1 ratified, scope enumerated, co-author attribution declared) were the routing surface that let them retire cleanly.
- The owner-action-as-cure substitution failure mode held: the owner explicitly nominated me Commit Marshal but did not micromanage the cycles; auto-mode + present-verdicts-not-menus + feedback_no_question_when_answer_is_forced carried the cycles forward without requiring fresh owner direction at each step.
- The collaboration-state commit residue exception worked as designed across all three cycles; the close-mid-cycle-then-re-stage pattern is clean and audit-traceable.
- Cycle 1 surfaced one new graduation candidate at owner direction: "Multi-agent auto-fix awareness". Captured in pending-graduations.md under cycle 2.

Blockers / risks at closeout:
- Hushed's hook-audit follow-up named in `91311a26` (pre-commit chain promoting auto-fix output into the staged set is a real concern) remains a pending investigation — not in marshal scope.
- Branch is 17+ commits ahead of main and not pushed. Stormy's merge-first verdict is the next owner-class decision.

Handoff needed: no. Marshal cycle complete.

— Fiery Kindling Brazier (9f4026)
